title: Data Scientist  For B.E Freshers
description:
As an AI/ML Data Scientist/Engineer Freshers, your role will involve supporting the development and validation of machine learning and statistical models for business use cases. You will assist in building forecasting and predictive models using established techniques and libraries. Additionally, you will contribute to Generative AI use cases, including prompt development, evaluation, and basic experimentation with LLMs. Your responsibilities will also include supporting Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflows, such as document ingestion, embeddings, and retrieval.

Key Responsibilities:
- Perform data preparation, feature engineering, and exploratory data analysis
- Work with structured and unstructured data from enterprise sources and AI platforms
- Collaborate with software engineers to integrate models into applications and pipelines
- Help document models, assumptions, results, and data pipelines
- Monitor model performance and assist with troubleshooting and improvements
- Build scalable AI/ML models for given use cases, including price elasticity and recommendation systems
- Leverage tools such as Databricks and AWS SageMaker to manage data, build models, and deploy solutions
- Collaborate with stakeholders, understanding their needs and translating them into AI/ML solutions
- Continually monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of AI/ML models and forecasting techniques, making necessary adjustments to optimize performance
- Stay abreast of the latest AI/ML trends and technologies, identifying opportunities for innovation and improvement

Qualifications Required:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related quantitative field
- Proficiency in Python and familiarity with data science libraries (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn)
- Basic understanding of machine learning algorithms and statistical modeling techniques
- Experience working with SQL and relational or NoSQL databases
- Exposure to cloud or data platforms such as Databricks or AWS
- Familiarity with version control tools such as Git
- Ability to clearly communicate data insights and document work
- Experience working in agile or Scrum-based teams

Please note that the job description does not provide any additional details about the company. title: Senior Data Scientist - Advanced Analytics & AI
description:
Senior Data Scientist

Our Purpose

Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.

Title and Summary
Senior Data ScientistSenior Specialist, Data Scientist
• Our Purpose
We work to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments and businesses realize their greatest potential. Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. We cultivate a culture of inclusion for all employees that respects their individual strengths, views, and experiences. We believe that our differences enable us to be a better team – one that makes better decisions, drives innovation and delivers better business results.
Job Title: Senior Data Scientist (Data, Analytics & AI), Advanced Analytics

Job Description Summary Overview
Advanced Analytics drives AI-based solutions and products at a globally scalable level across the different customer lifecycle stages, across both financial institutions and retail & commerce.

This role is for a Data Scientist that will work across Product, Client Services & Delivery, Data & Engineering and the broader teams, to deliver truly differentiated products driven by analytics & AI, leveraging rich data resources, AI platform capabilities and near real-time execution.

The Global Data Analytics & AI Product team is developing multiple new products and capabilities using analytics & AI, and this role is central in that vision, from concept, technical design to market release and optimization. This role is positioned to drive new ideas forward by combining creative thought leadership with innovation and industry best practices. By entering in the early phase of a truly transformative and impactful strategic initiative, the experience is certain to be rewarding. This role will report into the Vice President of Data Science & AI within Advanced Analytics.

This role requires the successful candidate to have the following:
- 6-9 years of experience in Data Science function supporting Products
- Prior experience in working in a data science product development role
- Strong hands-on experience in Advanced Analytics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Advanced Statistics etc.
- High proficiency in Python, Spark, SQL, R and be able to navigate across multiple languages
- Preferably with hands-on experience with Hadoop big data tools (Hive, Impala, Spark) or Databricks
- Demonstrated quantitative and problem-solving abilities including application to real business problems
- Strong project management skills and ability to meet business deadlines and execution
- Motivated, flexible, self-directed, and desire to lead small project teams as applicable
- Curiosity, creativity, and excitement for technology and innovation and outside-in perspectives
- Ability to multi-task and strong attention to detail including data utilized, methodology, results and validation
- Outstanding communication and organizational skills
- Masters preferred in Quantitative discipline like Physical Sciences, Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, Engineering etc.

The successful candidate’s primary responsibilities will be to:
- Drive the evolution of Advanced Analytics products with an impact focused on data science and engineering
- Participate in the exploration, application and development of data science for product development
- Participate in identification and evaluation of AI/ML techniques and tools to deliver models and analytics for product development
- Continuously innovate and determine new data science approaches & technologies to solve business problems and generate business insights & recommendations
- Partner with roles across the organization including product, engineering, and sales to determine the highest priority data science problems to solve in a customer-centric framework
- Evaluate trade-offs between many possible analytics solutions to a problem, taking into account performance, usability, technical feasibility, timelines, and differing stakeholder opinions to make a decision
- Break large solutions into smaller, releasable milestones to collect data and feedback from product managers, clients and other stakeholders
- Evangelize releases to users, incorporating feedback, and tracking usage to inform future development
- Work with small, cross-functional teams to define vision, establish team culture and processes
- Consistently focus on key drivers of organization value and prioritize operational activities accordingly
- Identify and act upon product improvement opportunities
- Provide technical leadership of junior colleagues as a senior member of the data science team, through technical and non-technical mentoring.

#AI3

Corporate Security Responsibility

All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
• Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
• Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
• Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
• Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

Experience Level
Senior Level

title: Data Scientist (Remote)
description:
Experience: 3.00 + years

Salary: INR 2800000.00 / year (based on experience)

Expected Notice Period: 7 Days

Shift: (GMT+05:30) Asia/Kolkata (IST)

Opportunity Type: Remote

Placement Type: Full Time Permanent position(Payroll and Compliance to be managed by: https://joinhorizons.com/)

(*Note: This is a requirement for one of Uplers client - An AI-driven platform that streamlines cash-flow analysis and loan decisioning)

What do you need for this opportunity

Must have skills required:

fintech domain, ML Platforms, Spark, TensorFlow, Theano., Java, Python, R, Tableau

An AI-driven platform that streamlines cash-flow analysis and loan decisioning is Looking for:

Role

Company is seeking a Data Scientist to be a key member of the technical team, responsible for designing and developing algorithms to be integrated into their products. Experience in implementing various types of machine learning models, including neural networks, linear regression, polynomial networks, and factorization machines, among others, is required. This position requires experience in developing algorithms that have been integrated into commercial products.

Responsibilities
• Responsible for the creation, identification, development, and continuous evolution of the comapny's machine learning based algorithms
• Communicate roadblocks, issues, and limitations related to algorithm development and make recommendations on creative solutions to build the product platform.
• Identify and deploy the best machine learning strategies, including when to use which strategy, such as supervised, unsupervised, semi-supervised, or reinforcement learning.
• Drive the associated data strategy, including sources, organization, collection, and extraction for use in the development and continuous evolution of matching algorithms.
• Apply advanced statistical techniques such as principal component analysis (PCA), hypothesis testing, outlier detection, and feature selection methods (e.g., mutual information) to clean, transform, and curate datasets for optimal performance in machine learning models.
• Work closely with the Engineering team to understand the optimal timing of integrating and validating developed algorithms in our products throughout the entire software development lifecycle, from concept to product.
• Work closely with the Principal Data Scientist as part of a cross-functional team to develop and evolve the Vitalxchange technology stack and intellectual property.
• Helping to identify areas where risk management practices should be adopted
• Adhering to company policies and standards of conduct, and reporting incidents and observed anomalies or weaknesses

Requirements
• Minimum 3 years of experience in developing machine learning algorithms in an applied field (financial lending applications desirable)
• Expert-level knowledge of three or more of the following: Java, Python, R, Spark, Tensorflow, Theano.
• Experience with multiple ML platforms to process structured and unstructured data
• Familiar with multiple ML techniques such as Linear Regression, Logistic Regression, Decision Trees, Vector Machines, Supervised/Unsupervised Learning
• Familiar with statistical techniques for curating data and evaluating machine learning models, such as creating confidence intervals, t-tests, chi-square tests, Bayesian inference, linear regression, logistic regression, k-means, mutual information, etc.
• MS or higher in Applied Mathematics, Computer Science, or a similar field with advanced coursework

How to apply for this opportunity
• Step 1: Click On Apply! And Register or Login on our portal.
• Step 2: Complete the Screening Form & Upload updated Resume
• Step 3: Increase your chances to get shortlisted & meet the client for the Interview!

About Uplers:

Our goal is to make hiring reliable, simple, and fast. Our role will be to help all our talents find and apply for relevant contractual onsite opportunities and progress in their career. We will support any grievances or challenges you may face during the engagement.

(Note: There are many more opportunities apart from this on the portal. Depending on the assessments you clear, you can apply for them as well).

So, if you are ready for a new challenge, a great work environment, and an opportunity to take your career to the next level, don't hesitate to apply today. We are waiting for you!

title: Data Scientist
description:
## Join our Team

About this opportunity:
Welcome to an exciting opportunity at Ericsson, where you'll be stepping into the role of a Data Scientist. As part of our team, you'll have the opportunity to develop unique machine learning solutions that address complex business issues. If you’ve ever thought “GenAI can do way more in Telecom than chatbots” — this role is for you. We’re building production-grade GenAI systems, AI agents, and enterprise copilots for Telecom OSS/BSS platforms—automation, intelligence, and decisioning at scale. No demos. No fluff. Real systems, real impact.

What you will do:
MCP-based applications and tools integrated with enterprise systems
Building GenAI Agents
RAG pipelines over network, service, customer & operational data
Scalable Python services & APIs powering GenAI workloads
Optimized SLMs for cost-efficient, low-latency deployment
Training of SLM/LLM based on domain requirements.

The skills you bring:
Statistics, Machine Learning Fundamentals, Deep learning expertise.
Feature Engineering & Model Selection.
Strong Python with hands-on ML / NLP and GenAI Agent development E2E experience (production grade not experimentation.
Experience in Training of LLM/SLM models and changing the network Architecture.
Track record of delivering business value in real production grade GenAI Agent.
Solid experience with LLMs, embeddings, retrieval systems and agent orchestration frameworks.
Proven expertise building GenAI copilots, persona-based agents.
Hands-on experience developing applications using MCP.
Experience with production grade cloud-native ML deployments.
Hands on experience in either of AWS Bedrock or GCP Vertex AI.

Good to have:
Strong academic background.
Experience in having journals & patents(US/India).
Telecom OSS/BSS domain ( business and data ) knowledge.
Experience in reasoning , knowledge graph.
Awareness of AI risk, observability, explainability & responsible AI.
Bonus: experience with Databricks, Snowflake, DataRobot, or similar AI platforms.

title: Interesting Job Opportunity: Data Scientist - Computer Vision/Medical Imaging
description:
Key Responsibilities
• Design, develop, and implement ML models for medical image recognition and analysis
• Fine-tune pre-trained deep learning models (CNNs, Vision Transformers) for diagnostic imaging tasks
• Conduct extensive model evaluation and validation using imaging datasets and clinical benchmarks
• Collaborate with healthcare professionals and domain experts to understand clinical requirements
• Optimise model performance, accuracy, and inference speed for production deployment
• Develop data pipelines and preprocessing workflows for large-scale imaging datasets
• Document methodologies, results, and create technical reports for stakeholders
• Stay updated with the latest research and advancements in diagnostic AI and medical Period : Immediate joiners or candidates who can join within 30 days Skills and Qualifications :
• Master's degree or higher in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Data Science, or related field
• 4+ years of hands on experience in machine learning and deep learning
• Proven experience with medical image recognition, diagnostic AI, or healthcare-related ML projects
• Strong proficiency in Python and popular ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn)
• Experience with image processing libraries (OpenCV, Pillow, DICOM) and medical imaging formats
• Solid understanding of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transfer learning techniques
• Familiarity with model evaluation metrics for imaging tasks (sensitivity, specificity, AUC, F1-score)
• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

(ref:hirist.tech)

title: Group Lead - Data Scientist
description:
Group Lead - Data Scientist
The Group Lead – Data Scientist will be responsible for driving data informed decision making across marketing initiatives by leading a team of analysts and overseeing analytical strategy, operational excellence, and impactful delivery. This role requires a mix of technical expertise, people leadership, strategic thinking, and strong business acumen.
We are looking for a proactive, collaborative leader who can inspire a team, establish best practices, and ensure the consistent delivery of high quality insights. The ideal candidate brings deep analytical experience, strong communication skills, and the ability to translate complex findings into actionable recommendations for business stakeholders.

Responsibilities

· Partner with senior business stakeholders to define analytical priorities, refine data requirements, and ensure the team delivers actionable insights that deepen understanding of consumer behavior and drive strategic decisions.

· Oversee and guide the execution of complex ad‑hoc analyses, ensuring analytical rigor, clarity of insights, and timely delivery across multiple simultaneous requests.

· Provide strategic direction for the development of predictive models, ensuring they support key business objectives and are implemented with high-quality standards and stakeholder alignment.

· Lead the design, development, and governance of reporting solutions, including dashboards, program tracking reports, model monitoring frameworks, and other analytics deliverables that support operational and strategic needs.

· Review and elevate the team's analytical outputs, ensuring findings are translated into clear, actionable business recommendations and communicated effectively to technical and non‑technical audiences.

· Collaborate closely with US and global counterparts to align analytical solutions with business readiness, requirements, and cross‑market expectations.

· Prioritize and manage analytics demand in a complex, matrixed environment, ensuring optimal resource allocation and proactive management of stakeholder expectations.

· Drive strong documentation and communication practices, ensuring clarity, transparency, reproducibility, and smooth collaboration across internal and external teams.

· Uphold and enforce high quality standards across all analytics deliverables, fostering best practices in data integrity, methodology, and analytical excellence.

Required Qualifications

· Engineering Degree (BE/ BTECH) or Master Degree in Economics / Mathematics / Operation Research or PG in Data Science/ML from a reputed institute

· 8+ years of experience in analytics

· Strong Python or R programming and data manipulation skills using SQL

· Strong quantitative/analytical/programming and problem-solving skills

· Knowledge of Data visualization tools like Power BI or Tableau

· Excellent knowledge of MS Excel, Power point and Word

· Highly motivated self-starter with excellent verbal and written communication skills

· Ability to work effectively in a team environment on multiple projects and drive results through direct and in-direct influence

Preferred Skills

· Hands-on experience with Dataiku/AWS tools (e.g., Sage Maker Studio, Athena)

· Experience in predictive modeling / machine learning

Experience working in Agile environments and cross-functional teams

About Our Company
Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 125 years. We are a U.S. based financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection. Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

Ameriprise India LLP is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, genetic information, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, veteran status, marital status, family status or any other basis prohibited by law.

Full-Time/Part-Time
Full time

Timings
(2:00p-10:30p)

AWMPO AWMP&S President's Office

title: Senior Data Scientist - Search and Recommendation
description:
At Wingify, our Data Science Team tackles diverse research challenges in Digital Experience Optimization, crafting cutting-edge solutions to help businesses grow. As a Senior Data Scientist, you will play a pivotal role, directly engaging with senior leadership while fostering a culture of learning through experimentation. You'll collaborate with teams across product development, engineering, and customer success to create impactful solutions, blending business insight with rigorous research.

What You'll Work On

Recommendation Systems
• Content, product, and experience recommendations
• Hybrid recommenders combining behavior, context, and semantics

User Profiling & Auto-Segmentation
• Automatic user profiling based on behavioral signals
• Affinity detection and interest clustering that generalizes across diverse industries
• ML-driven dynamic user segmentation

Attractiveness & Ranking Models
• Ranking experiences/items based on likelihood of engagement or conversion
• Moving beyond relevance to attractivenessandintent-aware scoring

Experimentation & Impact Measurement
• Designing models that are testable via A/B experiments
• Measuring incremental impact on conversion, engagement, and retention

What you bring
• 46 years of industry experience in Data Science / Applied ML
• Strong foundations in:

Machine learning (classification, clustering, ranking, recommendations)

Statistics and experimentation
• Proficiency in Python and common ML libraries
• Strong SQL skills and experience working with large datasets
• Ability to own problems independently and make good trade-offs
• Appreciation for clean, robust, and maintainable solutions

Experience with:
• Recommendation systems (collaborative, content-based, hybrid)
• User segmentation or personalization systems
• Clickstream / event-based data

Exposure to:
• Building real-time search systems
• NLP, embeddings, or representation learning
• Prior work in B2C products, especially at scale.
• Familiarity with A/B testing frameworks or experimentation platforms

Why Join Us
• Work at the forefront of digital optimization and experimentation.
• Collaborate with a talented, dynamic team that values innovation.
• Gain exposure to a unique blend of research and business-driven projects.
• Make a direct impact on customer experiences and business outcomes.

If you're passionate about blending rigorous research with customer-centric product development, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today and help shape the future of digital experience optimization.

title: Environment & Health Data Scientist, Lead Poisoning Prevention Program (India Posting)
Senior Data Scientist - Global Innovation
description:
Job Title: Senior Data Scientist - Global Innovation

Role-Band: 6

Location: Bangalore

Reporting to: Sr Manager, Category Management
• PURPOSE OF ROLE

This role sits at the intersection of advanced analytics, data science, and global commercial strategy, driving the development of next-generation analytical capabilities to optimize pricing, trade investments, portfolio mix, and market execution. The position will lead the design, scaling, and automation of machine learning and statistical frameworks that enable data-driven commercial decision-making, predictive scenario planning, and real-time performance management across markets.

By integrating diverse internal and external data ecosystems—including transactional, market, and customer-level intelligence— this role will generate actionable insights on price elasticity, promotional effectiveness, channel productivity, and category dynamics. The objective is to enable global commercial innovation, supporting smarter trade investments, stronger category strategies, and more effective go-to-market decisions that drive sustainable margin expansion, improved trade ROI, and accelerated growth across markets.

2.KEY TASKS AND ACCOUNTABILITIES

Lead the development of advanced commercial analytics solutions that support strategic decision-making across pricing, promotions, assortment, channel strategy, and go-to-market execution.

• Design and scale machine learning and statistical frameworks to analyze consumer behavior, market dynamics, and commercial performance across multiple markets and channels.

• Develop predictive and causal modeling capabilities to evaluate the impact of commercial initiatives, enabling data-driven optimization of trade investments, promotional strategies, and portfolio decisions.

• Build demand forecasting and market intelligence models that integrate internal and external signals—including market data, customer behavior, and competitive activity—to improve planning accuracy and strategic foresight.

• Apply advanced segmentation and clustering techniques to identify growth opportunities across customers, categories, and geographies, enabling more targeted commercial strategies.

• Drive scenario planning and simulation modeling to evaluate strategic business decisions under different market conditions and support forward-looking commercial strategy development.

• Lead commercial experimentation and impact measurement, using structured testing frameworks and quasi-experimental methods to assess the effectiveness of business initiatives.

• Integrate internal commercial datasets and external market intelligence to build scalable analytics pipelines and unified data foundations for advanced modeling and strategic insights.

• Develop automated analytics workflows and executive dashboards to track commercial performance, portfolio dynamics, and strategic KPIs in near real time.

• Partner closely with senior commercial leadership, finance, and regional market teams to translate analytical insights into actionable strategies and operational improvements.

• Prepare and deliver high-impact insights and strategic recommendations to VP and executive stakeholders, shaping commercial priorities and innovation roadmaps.

• Continuously improve model performance and scalability through advanced feature engineering, model validation, and deployment best practices.

• Mentor and guide analytics talent within the team, strengthening capabilities in advanced analytics, machine learning, and business storytelling.

• Maintain strong analytics governance and documentation, ensuring transparency, reproducibility, and long-term scalability of analytical solutions.

OTHER COMPETENCIES REQUIRED
• Presentation Skills: Effectively presenting findings and insights to stakeholders and senior leadership to drive informed decision-making.
• Collaboration: Working closely with cross-functional teams, including marketing, sales, and product development, to implement insights-driven strategies.
• Continuous Improvement: Actively seeking opportunities to enhance reporting processes and insights generation to maintain relevance and impact in a dynamic market environment.
• Data Scope Management: Managing the scope of data analysis, ensuring it aligns with the business objectives and insights goals.
• Act as a steadfast advisor to leadership, offering expert guidance on harnessing data to drive business outcomes and optimize customer experience initiatives. Serve as a catalyst for change by advocating for data-driven decision-making and cultivating a culture of continuous improvement rooted in insights gleaned from analysis.
• Continuously evaluate and refine reporting processes to ensure the delivery of timely, relevant, and impactful insights to leadership stakeholders while fostering an environment of ownership, collaboration, and mentorship within the team.

TECHNICAL SKILLS – MUST HAVE

• Data Analysis & Engineering: Strong proficiency in SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy), and advanced Excel for large-scale data processing and commercial analytics.

• Data Visualization & Reporting: Expertise in Power BI and Tableau to develop interactive dashboards and performance tracking tools.

• Advanced Analytics & Modeling: Experience in regression, time-series forecasting, and machine learning models using frameworks such as scikit-learn and XGBoost.

• Data Pipelines & Integration: Understanding of ETL processes and data pipelines to integrate internal and external datasets for scalable analytics.

• Executive Communication & Insights: Strong executive presence with the ability to translate complex analytics into clear insights and impactful PowerPoint narratives for senior leadership and VP-level stakeholders.

3.QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCE, SKILLS

Please list the following requirements

Level of educational attainment required:
• Bachelor or Post-Graduate in the field of Business & Marketing, Engineering/Solution, or other equivalent degree or equivalent work experience.
• Extensive experience solving business problems using quantitative approaches.
• Comfort with extracting, manipulating, and analyzing complex, high volume, high dimensionality data from varying sources.

Professional qualifications and accreditations/memberships required:
• MBA/Engg. in a relevant technical field such as Marketing/Finance.
• 5-8 years of experience in the Retail/CPG domain.
• Proficient in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, statsmodels) and SQL.
• Stakeholder management, and excellent interpersonal skills.

Language skills required:
• Fluent in English (Speaking, Reading, and Writing).

Technical and functional competencies:
• Proficient in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, statsmodels), SQL, and Power BI.
• Skilled in regression, Bayesian modeling, uplift modeling, time-series forecasting (ARIMA, SARIMAX, Prophet), and clustering (k-means).
• Strong grasp of hypothesis testing, model validation, and scenario simulation.

And above all of this, an undying love for beer!

We dream big to create future with more cheers.

title: Jr. Data Scientist
description:
We are looking for a motivated and skilled engineer in AI/ML and Generative AI to contribute to the design and development of innovative Analytics solutions. You will work as part of a collaborative, cross-functional team to build scalable models and systems that enhance decision-making, improve operational efficiency, and unlock insights from complex data.

Qualifications:
• Exceptional candidates with a Bachelor's degree in Engineering, preferably in IT, computer science, statistics, or data science, may also be considered.
• A degree in a relevant field such as Probability, Statistics, Machine Learning, Data Mining, Artificial Intelligence, or Computer Science or engineering disciplines.

Experience:

Overall experience needed: Must have minimum 3-4 years of professional experience in the relevant fields and roles such as Data Scientist/AI Engineer/Generative AI engineer or equivalent.

AI/ML: Development of Data Science/AI and Machine learning based solutions/prototypes/ PoCs for different domains, Solution Architecture Designing, Data Engineering, Algorithm Design, MLOPS

Generative AI (~1 year required) and Natural Language processing - Previous experience working with generative AI and developing solutions covering but not limited to LLMs, LLMOps, Retrieval Augmented Generation, prompt engineering, Understanding of chatbot development and deployment. Understanding of agentic framework.

Technology:

Must: Python (Numpy, Pandas), deep learning, NLTK, HuggingFace, TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, Langchain, Transformers, OpenAI GPT models, Mistral, LLAMA models and any other foundational models

Cloud-Azure/AWS-basic understanding of setting up, deploying, working with & managing cloud VMs

Desired skills and technology: Databricks, Streamlit, REST API, Flask. Frontend / UI technology experience is a plus.

Other skills:
• Skills and mindset: The candidate should have strong mathematical, analytical, and problem-solving skills, as well as a research-oriented and proactive attitude. The candidate should take ownership and result oriented.
• Team skills and collaborative – Collaborates closely with stakeholders and is a strong team player
• Research and innovation: The candidate should keep up with the latest developments in the relevant fields and seek new ways to leverage technology for better solutions.
• Software engineering: The candidate should be able to understand the requirements, test the solutions, and integrate analytical algorithms into a product.

Good to Have:

Domain experience/exposure: Automotive Domain Experience, Automotive Test Suite Experience, railways, aerospace, automation equipment, Embedded development, software development and testing, engineering and manufacturing, product engineering, design and development.

Responsibilities:
• Use data mining and machine learning techniques to build advanced systems.
• Design, develop, and validate data science models.
• Visualize data and explain outcomes.
• Create data preparation processes and tools.
• Ensure data ingestion and governance criteria are met.
• Design, develop, and implement solutions with a focus on Generative AI.
• Integrate generative AI into existing applications.
• Fine-tune language models for better performance.
• Collect, assess, and document requirements.
• Perform root cause analysis and offer improved approaches.
• Integrate analytical algorithms into a bigger solution/product.
• Understand business challenges and formulate data analysis approach.
• Define data requirements for analysis.
• Research innovative technologies.
• Interpret, document, and present analytical results.
• Build intelligent systems to enrich the end-user experience.
• Work with business and solution teams to conceptualize and manage data-driven projects.
